title: AI Fundamentals for Professionals
tagline: Go from curious to capable in one day
description: The workshop for anyone who has heard the noise about AI and wants the signal. No computer science degree required — just curiosity. You'll understand how large language models actually work, put them to use on your real tasks, and leave with a personal AI workflow you can run the very next morning.
objectives: Demystify how large language models work — in plain language
Practice hands-on with real AI tools on your own tasks
Design a personal AI workflow for your role
outcomes: Understand how large language models work without needing a technical background
Build and use your first AI assistant using real tools
Leave with a personal AI workflow you can use on Monday
deliverables: Prompt starter library for your role

curriculum.summary: LLMs explained through live demonstrations — what they can do, what they can't, and why.
Hands-on: apply AI to a task you actually do every week, guided step by step.
Set up a personal AI assistant with instructions tailored to your role.
Turn the day's wins into a durable practice — your personal AI adoption roadmap.
